strategy: Directly ground the end-of-third-quarter scoreboard visually near the known 120–126s anchor, then read the score text from the retrieved frame(s).

scoreboard visible with period and clock

steps.purpose: Read the scoreboard text from the retrieved frames to determine the score at the end of the third quarter.

refinement_instructions: Use the new evidence only to resolve the answer-critical field: the scoreboard score at the end of the third quarter. Prefer OCR-read scoreboard text from the retrieved end-of-quarter frames. The preprocess anchor around 120–126s and transcript mention of a buzzer-beater at the end of period three are useful for localization, but they are not final proof by themselves. Match the OCR score to the answer options and identify which team is leading based on the scoreboard ordering or labels if visible. If the retrieved frames do not clearly show both scores and the quarter/clock context, keep the answer unresolved rather than inferring from commentary.
